marshallese.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Function grapher. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 ñan 6 kālet kain function, D derivative, A area, T table, L katak.
marshallese.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Ijo function ej kijoone x-axis. Ilo point kein, f(x) = 0. Pukot roots ej aorōk ilo algebra im calculus.
marshallese.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Ijo function ej kijoone y-axis. Eñin ej value in f(0) — likūt wōt x = 0.
marshallese.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Slope ej ba ñan eok ewi joñan an utiej function ilo jabdewōt point. Tangent line ej uññūr curve ilo juon wōt point. Kōjerbal trace slider ñan etale!
marshallese.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative ej joñe rate in oktak. Kōpeḷḷọke ñan lo ewi wāween an slope oktak ilo function. Ijo f′(x) = 0, function ewōr local maximum ak minimum.
marshallese.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Area eo eṃōj kōmarōke ej kwaḷọk integral — aolep «accumulation» in f(x). Ilo mour eṃool, eñin emaroñ meḷeḷein tōḷọk eṃōj etetal, energy eṃōj kōjerbale, ak probability.
marshallese.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Ñe a > 0, parabola ej peḷḷọk lōñ (⏣). Ñe a < 0, ej peḷḷọk laḷ (⏢). Vertex ej point in oktak. Kajjioñ ukot 'a' ñan lo!
marshallese.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) ej kōṃṃan utiej, frequency (b) ej kōṃṃan jete cycles, im phase shift (c) ej ṃakūtkūt wave anmiiñ/anmooṇ. Period = 2π/b.
marshallese.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: kōjerbal naan ko repidodo in raan otemjej im sentence ko rekadu, ejjeḷọk jargon
marshallese.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: ñan juon ri-katak in high school ilo algebra ak pre-calc, kōn naan ko āinwōt slope, intercept, vertex, period, im amplitude
marshallese.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Kalikūt «Kōmeḷeḷe» ñan an AI tutor kōmeḷeḷeik function in ilo reading level eo kwaar kālete.
marshallese.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Function zoo — jiljino wāween function ko rekkeṇaan
marshallese.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders ñan amplitude, frequency, phase. Discrete 5-state classification. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal.
marshallese.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Hypothesis: Ewi wāween an phase shift jelōt wave eo ej waḷọk?
marshallese.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Pukot ruo settings ko rej kōṃṃan waves ko rejjo wōt ilo lale.
marshallese.what_does_negative_amplitude_do: Ta eo negative amplitude ej kōṃṃane?
marshallese.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ij meḷeḷe — kōmeḷeḷeik kōn naan ko aṃ make
marshallese.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Kōmeḷeḷeik ewi wāween an kajjojo parameter kōṃṃan sine wave.
marshallese.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Design note: discrete 5-state marker; ejjeḷọk wave score; ejjeḷọk reveal — kōn design.
